uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic in-bounds bytes; humidity=dec48+frac25/100=48.25%, temperature=dec21+frac50/100=21.5C. Expected decoded values reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (humidity/temperature/batteryCapacity/counts); normalized mapping (air.*, camelCase extras) authored here.

uplink.description: Aggregated temp/humidity (msgType 0x02) -> first reading to air.*, full batch as readings extra
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 2-reading aggregate (len = 2*4 + 11 = 19). Decoded reading values/timestamp reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; current reading promoted to air.* and the batch kept as the camelCase extra `readings`.

uplink.description: Single backlog message (msgType 0x03) -> air.* with timestamp extra
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 10-byte single backlog. Decoded humidity/temperature/timestamp reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; mapped to air.* plus the camelCase extra `timestamp`.

uplink.description: Multiple backlog messages (msgType 0x04) -> first reading to air.*, readings extra
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 1-reading multi-backlog (len = 1*8 + 3 = 11). Decoded values reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; current reading promoted to air.*, batch kept as `readings`. Options 0x01 decodes to the server-time-request flag.

uplink.description: Simple sensor config (msgType 0x05) -> config fields as camelCase extras (no measurement)
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 8-byte simple config. Decoded fields reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; all carried verbatim as camelCase extras (config messages carry no normalized measurement).

uplink.description: Advanced sensor config (msgType 0x06) -> config + alarm limits as camelCase extras
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 16-byte advanced config. Decoded fields (incl. signed low-temp limit -1 from byte 255) reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; carried as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Firmware version notification (msgType 0x07) -> version metadata as camelCase extras
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 11-byte FW version. partNumber is big-endian U32 of [1,2,3,4]=16909060; reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Carried as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Open/closed contact config (msgType 0x08) -> contact config as camelCase extras
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 10-byte contact config. Decoded fields/bitfields reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; carried as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Open/closed contact state (msgType 0x09) -> action.contactState plus extras
uplink._note: ORACLE: synthetic 6-byte contact state. Upstream `state` ("Open") reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; normalized to the vocabulary action.contactState enum (lowercase "open") with the raw value kept as the `state` extra.
ORACLE: synthetic 4-byte battery message; voltage=dec3+frac1/100=3.01 V reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Already in volts, so mapped directly to the vocabulary `battery` key.

uplink.description: Truncated internal temp/humidity payload -> length error
uplink._note: ORACLE: msgType 0x01 requires exactly 11 bytes; the 4-byte payload triggers the upstream length error, reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

ORACLE: type 0xFF is outside the dispatcher's 0x01-0x0A range (as are the external RTD/thermistor probe types 0x0B/0x0C, which upstream never routes), so it falls through to the upstream default error, reproduced by running reference/upstream-codec.js.
